chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2964 of 2018 Wajid Shaikh Versus Learned 1st Addl. District Judge & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 23.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan for petitioner. Mr. Qazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui holds brief for Mr. Ashraf Ali Butt for Cantonment Board along with Abdul Basit departmental representative. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, after some deliberation, on instructions, does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Chief Justice Judge
